title: vaccinium delavayi subsp. merrillianum
intro: Vaccinium delavayi subsp. merrillianum, also known as the Yunnan bilberry, is a plant species belonging to the heath family, Ericaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Yunnan and Sichuan provinces in China, and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and digestive issues, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Vaccinium delavayi subsp. merrillianum can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
